meaning: n.过道,(剧场,火车等)座间通道,(美国作aisle)舷侧门,舷梯,通路,跳板int.让路!躲开!
examples: Gangway watchman: May I see you pass, please?
Technicians use the same staircase to reach the gangway leading to the lighting desk and sound controls room.
Gangway watchman: Not exactly. Would you mind waiting for a moment? I'll call the OOW. Maybe, he can issue a temporary pass to you.
Here, it becomes things like a speedboat, a spaceship gangway (I think) and an all-purpose promontory.
Scuffles continued as Sir Oswald was shepherded to his car and his vehicle was punched and kicked as it drove off though a gangway cleared by mounted police.
